package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_imports_gin_directly: Service packages that depend on `github.com/gin-gonic/gin` instead of transport-neutral inputs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule166NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule166NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule166NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario166Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule166NegativeService, input Rule166NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
